data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of monthly payment regardless of attendance, but the evidence does not confirm that this requirement is satisfied. While the linked use case indicates that the CEO is charged $400/month regardless of attendance, there is no direct evidence from the API reads or persisted state checks that explicitly verifies this payment structure. The existing evidence primarily focuses on booking activities and does not address the payment model directly, leading to a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No direct evidence confirming the payment structure of charging monthly regardless of attendance.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add payment validation checks
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the system charges $400/month regardless of attendance.
